name: prefix-unique-across-lifecycle
assertion: No PROJECT_PREFIX appears under more than one of docs/projects/{planned,in-progress,completed}/ simultaneously

name: four-documents-present
assertion: A project folder contains exactly the 4 canonical documents (PRD, ARCHITECTURE, DEVELOPMENT_PLAN, PROJECT_TRACKER), each named <PREFIX>_<SUFFIX>.md

name: kanban-state-matches-folder
assertion: Every document's 'Kanban State' header line matches the lifecycle directory it physically lives in (Planned/In Progress/Completed)

name: no-ephemeral-planning-artifacts
assertion: No implementation_plan.md, task.md, or walkthrough.md file exists outside docs/projects/ for tracked project work
